scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html style.css app.js dist/ && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); let html = fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html', 'utf-8'); if(process.env.VITE_API_URL) { html = html.replace('</head>', '<script>window.API_BASE = \'' + process.env.VITE_API_URL + '\';</script></head>'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html', html); }"
